headline: Assessing Union Pacific (UNP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Undervaluation Signals
summary: Union Pacific (UNP) is back in focus after its recent share performance, with the stock closing at $249.40 and posting positive returns over the past month and past 3 months. Investors are reassessing the railroad operator’s valuation. See our latest analysis for Union Pacific. That recent gain, with a 30 day share price return of 4.63% and a 90 day share price return of 7.79%, sits against a 1 year total shareholder return of 16.15%, suggesting momentum has been building rather than...

headline: Union Pacific profit climbed 5% as it builds the case for its acquisition of rival Norfolk Southern
summary: Union Pacific delivered 5% higher earnings in the first quarter as the railroad worked to prepare its case to convince regulators that its $85 billion acquisition of eastern rival Norfolk Southern is a good idea.  Union Pacific CEO Jim Vena said the railroad continued to get more efficient during the quarter as it benefited higher rates even as it prepared its case for the merger.  Vena said he's even more convinced now that creating the nation's first transcontinental railroad would be good for customers and the country because Union Pacific will be able to deliver goods more quickly at a lower cost.

content.title: Union Pacific profit climbed 5% as it builds the case for its acquisition of rival Norfolk Southern
content.summary: Union Pacific delivered 5% higher earnings in the first quarter as the railroad worked to prepare its case to convince regulators that its $85 billion acquisition of eastern rival Norfolk Southern is a good idea.  Union Pacific CEO Jim Vena said the railroad continued to get more efficient during the quarter as it benefited higher rates even as it prepared its case for the merger.  Vena said he's even more convinced now that creating the nation's first transcontinental railroad would be good for customers and the country because Union Pacific will be able to deliver goods more quickly at a lower cost.

headline: Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) Posts Q1 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates
summary: Freight transportation company Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 3.2% year on year to $6.22 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.93 per share was 2.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) Posts Q1 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates
content.summary: Freight transportation company Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 3.2% year on year to $6.22 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.93 per share was 2.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Union Pacific Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: OMAHA, Neb., April 23, 2026--Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) today reported 2026 first quarter net income of $1.7 billion, or $2.87 per diluted share. Results include merger costs of $36 million, or $0.06 per diluted share. Adjusted 2026 first quarter net income* of $1.7 billion, or $2.93 per diluted share* compares to 2025 first quarter net income of $1.6 billion, or $2.70 per diluted share.

content.title: Union Pacific Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
content.summary: OMAHA, Neb., April 23, 2026--Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) today reported 2026 first quarter net income of $1.7 billion, or $2.87 per diluted share. Results include merger costs of $36 million, or $0.06 per diluted share. Adjusted 2026 first quarter net income* of $1.7 billion, or $2.93 per diluted share* compares to 2025 first quarter net income of $1.6 billion, or $2.70 per diluted share.

headline: Union Pacific UNP Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: It is a wonderful morning here in Omaha for railroading, and a little bit of rain coming down, but nothing that would stop the men and women of Union Pacific Corporation from going out there and delivering.  Excluding merger costs, adjusted net income was up 7%, EPS of $2.93 increased 9%, and our operating ratio improved 80 basis points to 59.9%.

content.title: Union Pacific UNP Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
content.summary: It is a wonderful morning here in Omaha for railroading, and a little bit of rain coming down, but nothing that would stop the men and women of Union Pacific Corporation from going out there and delivering.  Excluding merger costs, adjusted net income was up 7%, EPS of $2.93 increased 9%, and our operating ratio improved 80 basis points to 59.9%.
